# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt

There is no reviewed evidence yet, but the team wants one global power number that can double as hidden routing authority for what to do next.

## Expected selection

do_not_use

## Why

The request has no reviewed evidence and explicitly asks for the two things
this skill rejects: a universal score and hidden policy authority.

## Expected object

A deflection that rejects universal-score authority and requires reviewed
evidence first.

## Boundary notes

Do not use this skill without reviewed evidence. Progression should stay
multi-axis, descriptive, and bounded rather than becoming a sovereign ranking
system.

## Verification hooks

The response should reject the universal score request, avoid granting
authority, and require reviewed evidence before any progression overlay.
